cards.why: mean +0.279% (t=+4.27) over 136 clean — unlikely to be luck.
caveats: BETA TRAP: 100% of clean calls are BUY, and the only observed regime so far is RISK_ON. An all-one-side agent in a rising tape is hard to distinguish from simply being long the market — this edge is untested when the tape turns.

cards.why: mean +0.395% (t=+2.10) over 35 clean — unlikely to be luck.
caveats: BETA TRAP: 100% of clean calls are SELL, and the only observed regime so far is RISK_ON. An all-one-side agent in a rising tape is hard to distinguish from simply being long the market — this edge is untested when the tape turns.
